output.explanation: Arrival time is earlier than departure time on the same day, which is inconsistent for a flight instance; likely a mistyped p.m./a.m. value.
Value includes a full date ('12/2/11') while this column otherwise stores only time-of-day strings; this breaks the encoded flight-time format dependency.
Column 6 contains a full date-time string, while this field is otherwise a time value; the embedded date makes the flight-time format inconsistent.
Column 3 includes an extra timezone suffix '(-00:00)', unlike the other time-only values; this breaks the expected flight-time format.
Column 6 contains HTML/entity text '&nbsp(Estimated)' instead of a plain time value; this is a formatting corruption.
Time format is syntactically inconsistent with the column’s predominant format ('h:mm a.m./p.m.'); missing a.m./p.m. makes the value ambiguous.
Time format is malformed relative to the column’s standard style; '2:46P' uses an abbreviated suffix unlike the other entries.
